message:
feat(tui): add responsive layout builders for all dashboard screens (bd-xzt.3.8)

Add layout builders for S3 (Explainability), S4 (Candidates), S6 (LogSearch),
and S7 (Diagnostics) screens with narrow/wide responsive variants and
priority-based pane hiding. Add is_terminal_too_small() minimum-usable-size
guard and MIN_USABLE_COLS/ROWS constants. 45 comprehensive tests covering
responsive behavior, P0 pane visibility invariants, and edge cases.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
